'''''Spy Primer''''' was an espionage handbook written by [[Kyle Katarn]] and used by [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service]] agents. Galactic Alliance Intelligence agents [[Jae Juun]] and [[Tarfang]] read this book as part of their training.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1stm}}
